title: Why Discipline Beats Motivation

segments.text: Motivation is a feeling. Discipline is a decision.
And that difference decides your whole life.
Motivation waits until you feel ready.
Discipline acts even when you don't.
Feelings are unreliable. Habits are not.
Build the habit and the results follow.
Follow for your daily dose of discipline.

description: Motivation fades, discipline stays — that's the whole game. Follow for daily discipline!
